mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, summary, cover, user_id, category_id, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.cover, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.status, a.user_id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, a.category_id, c.name AS category_name, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.cover, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.status, a.user_id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, a.category_id, c.name AS category_name, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.status, a.user_id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, a.category_id, c.name AS category_name, a.create_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.status, a.user_id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, a.category_id, c.name AS category_name, a.create_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET view_count = #{viewCount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET like_count = #{likeCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, summary, cover, view_count, like_count, user_id, category_id, status, indexed, create_time, update_time FROM article WHERE status = 1
SELECT id, title, content, summary, cover, view_count, like_count, user_id, category_id, status, indexed, create_time, update_time FROM article WHERE indexed = #{indexed}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE indexed = #{indexed}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE 1=1
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
